Log:
  lnav is an ncurses based log file viewer, with syntax highlighting,
  filtering, tab completion for most operations, and sessions support.

  WWW: http://lnav.org/

  PR:		199062
  Submitted by:	Thomas Hurst <tom@hur.st>
